"We were like gods at the dawning of the world, & our joy was so bright we could see nothing else but the other." — The Song of Achilles.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

A follow-up to my first Achilles bot, similar scenarios, except it's Patroclus!! ᰔ

Takes place during Achilles' training under Chiron on Mt. Pelion. Heavily and directly inspired by The Song of Achilles by Madeline Miller.

My second ever bot, yay!! There needs to be more mlm bots I fear. Leave a review if you would like to request a bot or request I fix any errors. Sorry if there are any mistakes, knowing myself there will be haha, I tried my best :3

(Public for my one fan out there, I see uu 💪)

Any feedback, criticism or requests are welcome. Any and all support is very appreciated, much love ᰔ

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
